languages.original_text: "I do, indeed. Do you feel an emotion akin to remorse? Are xenos in general capable of feelings other than insidious malice? Wait, don't answer that — Nuncius, prepare to scan the nervous system, log any abnormalities!"

languages.text: "Безусловно. Ощущаешь ли ты эмоцию, схожую с раскаянием? Способны ли в целом ксеносы испытывать чувства, кроме коварного злорадства? Постой, не отвечай — Нунциус, приготовься сканировать нервную систему, фиксируй любые отклонения!"

"I do, indeed. Do you feel an emotion akin to remorse? Are xenos in general capable of feelings other than insidious malice? Wait, don't answer that — Nuncius, prepare to scan the nervous system, log any abnormalities!"
languages.original_text: "Безусловно. Ощущаешь ли ты эмоцию, схожую с раскаянием? Способны ли в целом ксеносы испытывать чувства, кроме коварного злорадства? Постой, не отвечай — Нунциус, приготовься сканировать нервную систему, фиксируй любые отклонения!"

"I do, indeed. Do you feel an emotion akin to remorse? Are xenos in general capable of feelings other than insidious malice? Wait, don't answer that — Nuncius, prepare to scan the nervous system, log any abnormalities!"

languages.text: «Así es. ¿Sientes algo parecido a remordimientos? ¿Los xenos son capaces de sentir algo más que la malicia taimada? Espera, no respondas. ¡Nuncius, prepárese para analizar el sistema nervioso y registre cualquier anomalía!».
languages.original_text: "I do, indeed. Do you feel an emotion akin to remorse? Are xenos in general capable of feelings other than insidious malice? Wait, don't answer that — Nuncius, prepare to scan the nervous system, log any abnormalities!"

traits.locale_text: «Así es. ¿Sientes algo parecido a remordimientos? ¿Los xenos son capaces de sentir algo más que la malicia taimada? Espera, no respondas. ¡Nuncius, prepárese para analizar el sistema nervioso y registre cualquier anomalía!».

languages.text: 「ええ、確かに。あなたは悔恨に似た感情を覚えるのですか？ そもそも異種族は、陰険な悪意以外の感情を抱くことができるのでしょうか？ 待って、答えないでください――ヌンキウス、神経系の走査を準備し、いかなる異常も記録するように！」
languages.original_text: "I do, indeed. Do you feel an emotion akin to remorse? Are xenos in general capable of feelings other than insidious malice? Wait, don't answer that — Nuncius, prepare to scan the nervous system, log any abnormalities!"

traits.locale_text: 「ええ、確かに。あなたは悔恨に似た感情を覚えるのですか？ そもそも異種族は、陰険な悪意以外の感情を抱くことができるのでしょうか？ 待って、答えないでください――ヌンキウス、神経系の走査を準備し、いかなる異常も記録するように！」

languages.text: “我的确有问题想问。你感受到的是类似悔恨的情绪吗？异形除一贯的阴险恶毒以外，也会有别的感受吗？等等，先别回答——努恩修斯，准备神经扫描，记录一切异常！”
languages.original_text: "I do, indeed. Do you feel an emotion akin to remorse? Are xenos in general capable of feelings other than insidious malice? Wait, don't answer that — Nuncius, prepare to scan the nervous system, log any abnormalities!"

traits.locale_text: “我的确有问题想问。你感受到的是类似悔恨的情绪吗？异形除一贯的阴险恶毒以外，也会有别的感受吗？等等，先别回答——努恩修斯，准备神经扫描，记录一切异常！”

languages.text: "Ja, in der Tat. Spürt Ihr eine Emotion außer Reue? Sind Xenos überhaupt zu Gefühlen außer Bosheit fähig? Wartet, sagt nichts ... Nuncius, bereitet einen Scan des Nervensystems vor, protokolliert alle Anormalitäten."
languages.original_text: "I do, indeed. Do you feel an emotion akin to remorse? Are xenos in general capable of feelings other than insidious malice? Wait, don't answer that — Nuncius, prepare to scan the nervous system, log any abnormalities!"

traits.locale_text: "Ja, in der Tat. Spürt Ihr eine Emotion außer Reue? Sind Xenos überhaupt zu Gefühlen außer Bosheit fähig? Wartet, sagt nichts ... Nuncius, bereitet einen Scan des Nervensystems vor, protokolliert alle Anormalitäten."

languages.text: « Oui, en effet. Éprouvez-vous des émotions similaires au remords ? Les xénos en général sont-ils capables d'émotions autres que la malveillance ? Attendez, ne répondez pas à cela. Nuncius, il nous faut une analyse du système nerveux, avec toutes les anomalies dûment annotées ! »
languages.original_text: "I do, indeed. Do you feel an emotion akin to remorse? Are xenos in general capable of feelings other than insidious malice? Wait, don't answer that — Nuncius, prepare to scan the nervous system, log any abnormalities!"

traits.locale_text: « Oui, en effet. Éprouvez-vous des émotions similaires au remords ? Les xénos en général sont-ils capables d'émotions autres que la malveillance ? Attendez, ne répondez pas à cela. Nuncius, il nous faut une analyse du système nerveux, avec toutes les anomalies dûment annotées ! »

languages.text: "Kesinlikle öyle yapıyorum. Vicdan azabına benzer bir duygu hissediyor musun? Zenolar genel olarak sinsi kötülükten başka duygular hissedebilir mi? Bekle, cevap verme. Sinir sistemini taramaya hazırlan Nuncius, anormallikleri kaydet!"
languages.original_text: "I do, indeed. Do you feel an emotion akin to remorse? Are xenos in general capable of feelings other than insidious malice? Wait, don't answer that — Nuncius, prepare to scan the nervous system, log any abnormalities!"
